mapper.select: SELECT wallet_id::varchar AS walletId, member_id AS memberId, balance, status, version, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM pay.wallets ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT balance FROM pay.wallets WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pay.transactions (wallet_id, transaction_type, amount, balance_after, reference_id, description) VALUES (#{walletId}::uuid, #{transactionType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{referenceId}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT transaction_id::varchar AS transaction_id, wallet_id::varchar AS wallet_id, amount, balance_after FROM pay.transactions WHERE reference_id = #{referenceId} AND transaction_type = #{transactionType} LIMIT 1
